title: Exploring Ocean Animals
description: Students will learn about different ocean animals and their unique characteristics.

prompts.input: Name two ocean animals. Tell one thing about each.
hints: Consider what makes each animal special.

prompts.input: Some ocean animals are mammals and some are fish. Name one example of each.
hints: Remember, mammals breathe air and fish breathe water.
Think of animals you might see in an aquarium or the ocean.

subject: Science
